title: Add Username Availability Check
description: Extend the registration flow to check if a username is available in real-time.
instructions:
Implement a username availability check feature:

1. Create a UsernameValidator class that:
   - Checks if the username meets format requirements (alphanumeric, 3-20 chars)
   - Debounces the availability check (wait 500ms after user stops typing)
   - Calls an API endpoint to check if username is taken
   - Returns a status: available, taken, invalid, or checking

2. Create a UsernameInput widget that:
   - Shows a text field for username entry
   - Displays visual feedback (checkmark, X, or spinner) based on status
   - Shows appropriate error messages
   - Disables the submit button if username is taken or invalid

3. Integrate this into the registration form

hints.text: Use Timer for debouncing - cancel previous timer and start new one on each keystroke.
Use an enum for UsernameStatus with values: initial, checking, available, taken, invalid.
Consider using Riverpod to manage the username state so it can be accessed from both the widget and the submit button.
